name: Steam
description: Exports your Steam profile, game library with playtime stats, and friend list using the Steam Web API.

scopes.label: Your Profile
scopes.description: Steam profile including persona name, avatar, level, country, and account age

scopes.label: Your Games
scopes.description: Owned games with playtime statistics, plus recently played games

scopes.label: Your Friends
scopes.description: Friend list with persona names, avatars, and friendship dates
